detectors.description:
WithdrawalConfigurations.constructor(uint256,uint256) (SmartWallet.sol#333-353) contains a tautology or contradiction:
	- require(bool)(_minWithdrawalCoolingPeriod >= 0) (SmartWallet.sol#345)

Ownable.constructor(address)._owner (SmartWallet.sol#51) lacks a zero-check on :
		- owner = _owner (SmartWallet.sol#53)

Reentrancy in SmartWalletLib.transferToUserWithdrawalAccount(SmartWalletLib.Wallet,IERC20Token,uint256,IERC20Token,uint256) (SmartWallet.sol#609-635):
	External calls:
	- _feesToken.transfer(_self.feesAccount,_fee) (SmartWallet.sol#623)
	- _token.transfer(_self.userWithdrawalAccount,_amount) (SmartWallet.sol#629)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- TransferToUserWithdrawalAccount(_token,_self.userWithdrawalAccount,_amount,_feesToken,_self.feesAccount,_fee) (SmartWallet.sol#631)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [SmartWalletLib.transferToUserWithdrawalAccount(SmartWalletLib.Wallet,IERC20Token,uint256,IERC20Token,uint256)](SmartWallet.sol#L609-L635):
	External calls:
	- [_feesToken.transfer(_self.feesAccount,_fee)](SmartWallet.sol#L623)
	- [_token.transfer(_self.userWithdrawalAccount,_amount)](SmartWallet.sol#L629)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- [TransferToUserWithdrawalAccount(_token,_self.userWithdrawalAccount,_amount,_feesToken,_self.feesAccount,_fee)](SmartWallet.sol#L631)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in SmartWalletLib.performUserWithdraw(SmartWalletLib.Wallet,IERC20Token) (SmartWallet.sol#719-739):
	External calls:
	- userBalance = _token.balanceOf(this) (SmartWallet.sol#733)
	- _token.transfer(_self.userWithdrawalAccount,userBalance) (SmartWallet.sol#735)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- PerformUserWithdraw(_token,_self.userWithdrawalAccount,userBalance) (SmartWallet.sol#737)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [SmartWalletLib.performUserWithdraw(SmartWalletLib.Wallet,IERC20Token)](SmartWallet.sol#L719-L739):
	External calls:
	- [userBalance = _token.balanceOf(this)](SmartWallet.sol#L733)
	- [_token.transfer(_self.userWithdrawalAccount,userBalance)](SmartWallet.sol#L735)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- [PerformUserWithdraw(_token,_self.userWithdrawalAccount,userBalance)](SmartWallet.sol#L737)
